landing.oneLastStepDesc: You're signed in! Connect a Solana wallet to Mint Your Soul and access the Oracle.
landing.heroDesc: Unlock your Potensi (Birth Potential) and daily Peluang (Opportunities) for business & relationships through the ancient Wuku calendar. Powered by AI and $NEPTU on Solana.
landing.featuresDesc: Neptu bridges 210-day Wuku cycles with blockchain permanence.
landing.feature1.title: Potensi
landing.feature1.subtitle: Birth Identity
landing.feature1.desc: Your immutable spiritual fingerprint based on the Wuku calendar. Mint your soul profile.
landing.feature2.title: Peluang
landing.feature2.subtitle: Daily Guidance
landing.feature2.desc: Know the right time to act. Daily alignment guides for business ventures, partnership harmony, and personal success.
landing.feature3.title: Oracle Agent

landing.feature3.desc: Chat with our Wuku-trained AI agent for personalized interpretations and advice.

landing.feature4.desc: Pay with SOL to earn $NEPTU. 50% of protocol revenue is burned daily.

landing.step1.desc: Login with Phantom or Solflare. No wallet? We'll create one for you instantly.
landing.step2.title: Input Birth Date
landing.step2.desc: Our algorithm calculates your unique Wuku combination (Panca Wara + Sapta Wara).
landing.step3.title: Unlock Wisdom

crypto.title: Crypto Cosmic Birthdays
crypto.description: Discover the genesis dates of major cryptocurrencies combined with Balinese astrology insights. Each coin has a unique cosmic alignment based on the ancient Wuku calendar.
crypto.notFoundDesc: We couldn't find information for this cryptocurrency.
crypto.prediction.howItWorksDesc: Neptu uses the ancient Balinese Wuku calendar. The Panca Wara (5-day) and Sapta Wara (7-day) cycles combine to form a 35-day repeating pattern. Days with matching cycle positions share similar cosmic energy.
crypto.prediction.cosmicDateDesc: The Panca Wara (5-day market cycle) and Sapta Wara (7-day cycle) combine to create a 35-day repeating energy pattern. These dates share the same cosmic signature as ATH/ATL.
crypto.prediction.disclaimerText: This analysis is based on historical ATH/ATL data combined with Balinese cosmic calculations. It is for entertainment and educational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research before making investment decisions.
crypto.cosmic.wukuCycleDesc: 30-week Balinese calendar cycle based on genesis date
crypto.cosmic.noData: Cosmic data not available for this cryptocurrency
crypto.cosmic.aboutDesc: Neptu uses the ancient Balinese Wuku calendar to calculate cosmic alignments. Each cryptocurrency has a unique energetic signature based on its genesis date, combined with today's cosmic configuration from the Panca Wara (5-day), Sapta Wara (7-day), and Wuku (210-day) cycles.
crypto.chart.title: Price Chart
crypto.chart.disclaimer: Predictions are based on cosmic alignment patterns and historical data. Not financial advice.
p2p.heroDesc: Buy, sell, and transfer NEPTU & SUDIGITAL tokens directly on Solana. No intermediaries, no liquidity pool needed — pure peer-to-peer.
p2p.howDesc: A hybrid payment model designed for organic token distribution and real treasury value.
p2p.paySOL.title: Pay with SOL
p2p.paySOL.desc: Use SOL to pay for readings and services. You'll automatically receive NEPTU tokens as rewards.
p2p.paySOL.step1: Pay SOL for reading or service
p2p.paySUDIGITAL.title: Pay with SUDIGITAL
p2p.paySUDIGITAL.desc: Pay with SUDIGITAL tokens and earn NEPTU rewards automatically. Part of the SUDIGITAL ecosystem.
p2p.paySUDIGITAL.step1: Pay SUDIGITAL for reading or service
p2p.payNEPTU.title: Pay with NEPTU
p2p.payNEPTU.desc: Already have NEPTU? Use it to pay for services. 50% is burned, making NEPTU more scarce.
p2p.payNEPTU.step1: Pay NEPTU for reading or service
p2p.transfer.title: P2P Transfer
p2p.transfer.desc: NEPTU & SUDIGITAL are standard SPL tokens on Solana. Transfer freely to any wallet or hold.
p2p.transfer.step1: Transfer NEPTU or SUDIGITAL to any wallet
p2p.transfer.step2: Send tokens directly to any Solana address
p2p.transfer.step3: No restrictions — your tokens, your choice
p2p.why.noPool.title: No Liquidity Pool
p2p.why.noPool.desc: No LP needed at launch. Organic distribution through usage rewards.
p2p.why.deflationary.title: Deflationary
p2p.why.deflationary.desc: 50% burned on every NEPTU payment. Supply decreases over time.
p2p.why.zeroCost.title: Zero Platform Cost
p2p.why.zeroCost.desc: Users pay Solana tx fees. Platform operational cost is $0.
p2p.why.fixedSupply.title: Fixed Supply
p2p.why.fixedSupply.desc: 1 billion max. No minting after launch. Only burns.
p2p.token.name: Token
p2p.ctaDesc: Connect your wallet and start earning NEPTU tokens through readings and daily activities.

compatibility.title: Mitra Satru Compatibility
compatibility.subtitle: Check the compatibility between two birth dates based on the Balinese Wuku calendar
compatibility.enterDates: Enter two birth dates to discover your Mitra Satru compatibility
compatibility.description.mitra: These two energies are in harmony — a natural alliance that supports growth and mutual benefit.
compatibility.description.neutral: These two energies are balanced — neither strongly aligned nor opposed, offering flexibility.
compatibility.description.satru: These two energies create tension — challenges that can build strength through understanding.
compatibility.aiSummaryHint: Get an AI-powered interpretation of this compatibility reading
compatibility.aiError: Failed to get AI insight. Please try again.
